_description: Prior authorization requirement rules. Maps procedure categories and specific codes to PA requirements by plan type. Modeled on common US commercial payer policies (e.g. advanced imaging, elective surgery, specialty drugs typically require PA; routine PT/preventive often do not). Used by the Eligibility agent to decide if PA is needed and by the mock payer for coverage rules.

HMO._note: HMO plans require PA for everything in pa_required_categories plus GI Procedures and General Surgery

PPO._note: PPO plans are more permissive; Ophthalmology and Preventive Imaging never require PA

covered_procedures_by_insurer._description: Procedures NOT in an insurer's covered list are denied PR-96 (plan exclusion) by the mock payer. Empty list means all procedures covered.

non_covered_examples._description: Specific (insurer, code) pairs that are explicitly excluded to demonstrate PR-96 denials and appeal-letter generation.
